modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use an even and factual tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be a few minor typos and some contradictory ordering.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Request to set up deposits and application fees for online payment

full_description_text: User wants to know how to request deposits or application fees. They mentioned needing to increase the deposit for the Physician Assistants Program. Also, they asked about options for collecting fees for courses or conferences. There are some details needed for the request.

description: User wants to know how to request deposits or application fees. They mentioned needing to increase the deposit for the Physician Assistants Program. Also, they asked about options for collecting fees for courses or conferences. There are some details needed for the request.
